problem id: 989dde0a
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(2) AND NOT SHL(1)

examples:
  00011110 -> 01000000
  01001100 -> 00100001
  01001000 -> 00100001
  00000100 -> 00010000
  10011010 -> 01001010
  11100000 -> 00000011
  01010110 -> 01010001
  11100101 -> 00010101

query: 10011101
predicted answer: 01000100
